text.title: AI-Assisted Interview Note Synthesis Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report cites a quote that never appears in any transcript.
antipattern.root-cause: LLM invented a paraphrase the team did not verify against source.
antipattern.fix: Verify every quote via grep against the original transcripts pre-publish.

antipattern.symptom: Theme labeled 'strong' rests on one interviewee's words.
antipattern.fix: Reject themes with <3 supporting interviewees as 'individual-only'.

antipattern.symptom: PM ships a feature based on a 'moderate' theme thinking it was 'strong'.
antipattern.root-cause: No confidence column in the report.
antipattern.fix: Add confidence column; require H/M/L per theme.
